headline: Ford promises Canada's autoworkers raises, bonuses and job security
summary: Unifor released the details of the tentative agreement it won with Ford Motor as some 5,000 members vote on it this weekend.

headline: Price Prediction: Tesla Poised for 12% Rally as Profit Margins Improve
summary: Tesla has pulled back sharply from its December highs, leaving investors to weigh a stock priced for perfection against a wave of catalysts that could rewrite the bull case entirely.

raw.headline: Price Prediction: Tesla Poised for 12% Rally as Profit Margins Improve
raw.summary: Tesla has pulled back sharply from its December highs, leaving investors to weigh a stock priced for perfection against a wave of catalysts that could rewrite the bull case entirely.

headline: Battery Theme Diverges as Legacy Automakers Outperform Struggling Lithium Producers
summary: A notable divergence is emerging in EV and battery stocks—legacy automakers like GM and Ford with low valuations and strong relative strength outperform struggling lithium producers and speculative tech plays.

raw.headline: Battery Theme Diverges as Legacy Automakers Outperform Struggling Lithium Producers
raw.summary: A notable divergence is emerging in EV and battery stocks—legacy automakers like GM and Ford with low valuations and strong relative strength outperform struggling lithium producers and speculative tech plays.

headline: HPI: Fiscal Dominance Could Challenge Ability To Deliver Attractive Real Returns
summary: John Hancock Preferred Income Fund (HPI) yields 9.17% via preferreds + bonds. Read here for a detailed invstment analysis.
